articles.description: Follow build-up before live text commentary as Manchester United host Brentford in the Premier League.
articles.title: Manchester United vs Brentford LIVE: Premier League preview, team news, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: Watch live coverage and follow text updates as Neil Robertson faces Chris Wakelin & Judd Trump takes on Hossein Vafaei  in the second round at the Crucible in Sheffield.
articles.title: World Snooker Championship 2026 LIVE: Watch Neil Robertson, Chris Wakelin, Judd Trump & Hossein Vafaei streams, scores, results

articles.description: Four-time winner John Higgins produces a sensational recovery from 8-3 and 9-4 down to defeat Ronnie O'Sullivan 13-12 in a final-frame last-16 Crucible epic.
articles.title: John Higgins recovers to beat Ronnie O'Sullivan in Crucible epic in World Championship last 16

articles.description: Next season, leagues will be allowed to select from a series of trials to try to stop the goalkeeper tactical time-out. BBC Sport looks at the proposals.
articles.title: Tactical time-outs: How could football's goalkeeper problem be fixed?

articles.description: Former heavyweight world champion Anthony Joshua has signed to fight Tyson Fury but will first have a warm-up fight against Kristian Prenga in Riyadh on 25 July.
articles.title: Anthony Joshua signs to fight Tyson Fury after comeback fight against Kristian Prenga in July

articles.description: Sabastian Sawe and Tigst Assefa rewrote the record books in London on Sunday. Was it in part down to the shoes?
articles.title: Lighter than a bar of soap: The shoes Sawe wore to shatter marathon record

articles.description: R&A chief executive Mark Darbon says that players guilty of on course misconduct could receive a two-shot penalty at the Open in July.
articles.title: The Open golf: Players guilty of on-course misconduct could face a two-shot penalty

articles.description: Thirty-two teams have fallen in this season's Champions League and four remain - so who will become kings of Europe on 30 May? BBC Sport delves into the stats, while experts make predictions.
articles.title: Who will win Champions League? Arsenal, Bayern Munich, Atletico Madrid or PSG?

articles.description: This epic Scottish Premiership season won't be over until it's over, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Rangers blink but twists still to come in colossal Scottish Premiership race as Hearts lead Celtic at top

articles.description: Arsenal expect Kai Havertz to play a part in their title run-in despite the forward suffering a muscular injury against Newcastle.
articles.title: Kai Havertz injury: Arsenal expect forward to play a part in title run-in despite upper leg issue
